text: dbry nchmyh bn-chkhlyh vyhy bchdsh- [khslv kh] (khslyv q) shnt 'shrym v'ny hyyty bshvshn hbyrh
vyb' chnny 'chd m'chy hv' v'nshym myhvdh v'sh'lm 'l-hyhvdym hflyth 'shr-nsh'rv mn-hshby v'l-yrvshlm
vy'mrv ly hnsh'rym 'shr-nsh'rv mn-hshby shm bmdynh br'h gdlh vbchrfh vchvmt yrvshlm mfrtst vsh'ryh ntstv b'sh
vyhy khshm'y  't-hdbrym h'lh yshbty v'bkhh v't'blh ymym v'hy tsm vmtfll lfny 'lhy hshmym
v'mr 'n' yhvh 'lhy hshmym h'l hgdvl vhnvr' shmr hbryt vchsd l'hbyv vlshmry mtsvtyv
thy n' 'znkh-qshbt v'ynykh ftvchvt  lshm' 'l-tflt 'bdkh 'shr 'nkhy mtfll lfnykh hyvm yvmm vlylh 'l-bny yshr'l 'bdykh vmtvdh 'l-cht'vt bny-yshr'l 'shr cht'nv lkh v'ny vbyt-'by cht'nv
chbl chblnv lkh vl'-shmrnv 't-hmtsvt v't-hchqym v't-hmshftym 'shr tsvyt 't-mshh 'bdkh
zkhr-n' 't-hdbr 'shr tsvyt 't-mshh 'bdkh l'mr 'tm tm'lv 'ny 'fyts 'tkhm b'mym
vshbtm 'ly vshmrtm mtsvty v'shytm 'tm 'm-yhyh ndchkhm bqtsh hshmym mshm 'qbtsm [vhbv'tym kh] (vhby'vtym q) 'l-hmqvm 'shr bchrty lshkhn 't-shmy shm
vhm 'bdykh v'mkh 'shr fdyt bkhchkh hgdvl vbydkh hchzqh
'n' 'dny thy n' 'znkh-qshbt 'l-tflt 'bdkh v'l-tflt 'bdykh hchftsym lyr'h 't-shmkh vhtslychh-n' l'bdkh hyvm vtnhv lrchmym lfny h'ysh hzh v'ny hyyty mshqh lmlkh  f
vyhy  bchdsh nysn shnt 'shrym l'rtchshst'  hmlkh yyn lfnyv v'sh' 't-hyyn v'tnh lmlkh vl'-hyyty r' lfnyv
vy'mr ly hmlkh mdv'  fnykh r'ym v'th 'ynkh chvlh 'yn zh khy-'m r' lb v'yr' hrbh m'd
v'mr lmlkh hmlkh l'vlm ychyh mdv' l'-yr'v fny 'shr h'yr byt-qbrvt 'bty chrbh vsh'ryh 'khlv b'sh    s
vy'mr ly hmlkh 'l-mh-zh 'th mbqsh v'tfll 'l-'lhy hshmym
v'mr lmlkh 'm-'l-hmlkh tvb v'm-yytb 'bdkh lfnykh 'shr tshlchny 'l-yhvdh 'l-'yr qbrvt 'bty v'bnnh
vy'mr ly hmlkh vhshgl  yvshbt 'tslv 'd-mty yhyh mhlkhkh vmty tshvb vyytb lfny-hmlkh vyshlchny v'tnh lv zmn
v'vmr lmlkh 'm-'l-hmlkh tvb 'grvt ytnv-ly 'l-fchvvt 'br hnhr 'shr y'byrvny 'd 'shr-'bv' 'l-yhvdh
v'grt 'l-'sf shmr hfrds 'shr lmlkh 'shr ytn-ly 'tsym lqrvt 't-sh'ry hbyrh 'shr-lbyt vlchvmt h'yr vlbyt 'shr-'bv' 'lyv vytn-ly hmlkh khyd-'lhy htvbh 'ly
v'bv' 'l-fchvvt  'br hnhr v'tnh lhm 't 'grvt hmlkh vyshlch 'my hmlkh shry chyl vfrshym  f
vyshm' snblt hchrny vtvbyh h'bd h'mny vyr' lhm r'h gdlh 'shr-b' 'dm lbqsh tvbh lbny yshr'l
v'bv' 'l-yrvshlm v'hy-shm ymym shlshh
v'qvm  lylh 'ny v'nshym  m't 'my vl'-hgdty l'dm mh 'lhy ntn 'l-lby l'shvt lyrvshlm vbhmh 'yn 'my khy 'm-hbhmh 'shr 'ny rkhb bh
v'ts'h bsh'r-hgy' lylh v'l-fny 'yn htnyn v'l-sh'r h'shft v'hy shbr bchvmt yrvshlm 'shr- [hmfrvtsym kh] (hm  q) (frvtsym q) vsh'ryh 'khlv b'sh
v''br 'l-sh'r h'yn v'l-brkht hmlkh v'yn-mqvm lbhmh l'br tchty
v'hy 'lh bnchl lylh v'hy shbr bchvmh v'shvb v'bv' bsh'r hgy' v'shvb
vhsgnym l' yd'v 'nh hlkhty vmh 'ny 'shh vlyhvdym vlkhhnym vlchrym vlsgnym vlytr 'shh hml'khh 'd-khn l' hgdty
v'vmr 'lhm 'tm r'ym hr'h 'shr 'nchnv bh 'shr yrvshlm chrbh vsh'ryh ntstv b'sh lkhv vnbnh 't-chvmt yrvshlm vl'-nhyh 'vd chrfh
v'gyd lhm 't-yd 'lhy 'shr-hy' tvbh 'ly v'f-dbry hmlkh 'shr 'mr-ly vy'mrv nqvm vbnynv vychzqv ydyhm ltvbh  f
vyshm' snblt hchrny vtbyh  h'bd h'mvny vgshm h'rby vyl'gv lnv vybzv 'lynv vy'mrv mh-hdbr hzh 'shr 'tm 'shym h'l hmlkh 'tm mrdym
v'shyb 'vtm dbr v'vmr lhm 'lhy hshmym hv' ytslych lnv v'nchnv 'bdyv nqvm vbnynv vlkhm 'yn-chlq vtsdqh vzkhrvn byrvshlm
vyqm 'lyshyb hkhhn hgdvl v'chyv hkhhnym vybnv 't-sh'r hts'n hmh qdshvhv vy'mydv dlttyv v'd-mgdl hm'h qdshvhv 'd mgdl chnn'l    s
v'l-ydv bnv 'nshy yrchv    s   v'l-ydv bnh zkhvr bn-'mry    s
v't sh'r hdgym bnv bny hsn'h hmh qrvhv vy'mydv dlttyv mn'vlyv vbrychyv    s
v'l-ydm hchzyq mrmvt bn-'vryh bn-hqvts    s   v'l-ydm hchzyq mshlm bn-brkhyh bn-mshyzb'l    s   v'l-ydm hchzyq tsdvq bn-b'n'    s
v'l-ydm hchzyqv htqv'ym v'dyryhm l'-hby'v tsvrm b'bdt 'dnyhm    s
v't sh'r hyshnh hchzyqv yvyd' bn-fsch vmshlm bn-bsvdyh hmh qrvhv vy'mydv dlttyv vmn'lyv vbrychyv    s
v'l-ydm hchzyq mltyh hgb'ny vydvn hmrnty 'nshy gb'vn vhmtsfh lkhs' fcht 'br hnhr    s
'l-ydv hchzyq 'zy'l bn-chrhyh tsvrfym    s   v'l-ydv hchzyq chnnyh bn-hrqchym vy'zbv yrvshlm 'd hchvmh hrchbh    s
v'l-ydm hchzyq rfyh bn-chvr shr chtsy flkh yrvshlm    s
v'l-ydm hchzyq ydyh bn-chrvmf vngd bytv    s   v'l-ydv hchzyq chtvsh bn-chshbnyh
mdh shnyt hchzyq mlkhyh bn-chrm vchshvb bn-fcht mv'b v't mgdl htnvrym    s
v'l-ydv hchzyq shlvm bn-hlvchsh shr chtsy flkh yrvshlm hv' vbnvtyv    s
't sh'r hgy' hchzyq chnvn vyshby znvch hmh bnvhv vy'mydv dlttyv mn'lyv vbrychyv v'lf 'mh bchvmh 'd sh'r hshfvt
v't  sh'r h'shfvt hchzyq mlkhyh bn-rkhb shr flkh byt-hkhrm hv' ybnnv vy'myd dlttyv mn'lyv vbrychyv    s
v't sh'r h'yn hchzyq shlvn bn-khl-chzh shr flkh hmtsfh hv' ybnnv vytllnv [vy'mydv kh] (vy'myd q) dlttyv mn'lyv vbrychyv v't chvmt brkht hshlch lgn-hmlkh v'd-hm'lvt hyvrdvt m'yr dvyd    s
'chryv hchzyq nchmyh bn-'zbvq shr chtsy flkh byt-tsvr 'd-ngd qbry dvyd v'd-hbrkhh h'shvyh v'd byt hgbrym    s
'chryv hchzyqv hlvym rchvm bn-bny 'l-ydv hchzyq chshbyh shr-chtsy-flkh q'ylh lflkhv    s
'chryv hchzyqv 'chyhm bvy bn-chndd shr chtsy flkh q'ylh    s
vychzq 'l-ydv 'zr bn-yshv' shr hmtsfh mdh shnyt mngd 'lt hnshq hmqts'    s
'chryv hchrh hchzyq brvkh bn- [zby kh] (zkhy q) mdh shnyt mn-hmqtsv' 'd-ftch byt 'lyshyb hkhhn hgdvl    s
'chryv hchzyq mrmvt bn-'vryh bn-hqvts mdh shnyt mftch byt 'lyshyb v'd-tkhlyt byt 'lyshyb    s
v'chryv hchzyqv hkhhnym 'nshy hkhkhr
'chryv hchzyq bnymn vchshvb ngd bytm    s   'chryv hchzyq 'zryh bn-m'shyh bn-'nnyh 'tsl bytv    s
'chryv hchzyq bnvy bn-chndd mdh shnyt mbyt 'zryh 'd-hmqtsv' v'd-hfnh
fll bn-'vzy mngd hmqtsv' vhmgdl hyvts' mbyt hmlkh h'lyvn 'shr lchtsr hmtrh 'chryv fdyh bn-fr'sh    s
vhntynym hyv yshbym b'fl 'd ngd sh'r hmym lmzrch vhmgdl hyvts'    s
'chryv hchzyqv htq'ym mdh shnyt mngd hmgdl hgdvl hyvts' v'd chvmt h'fl
m'l  sh'r hsvsym hchzyqv hkhhnym 'ysh lngd bytv    s
'chryv hchzyq tsdvq bn-'mr ngd bytv    s   v'chryv hchzyq shm'yh bn-shkhnyh shmr sh'r hmzrch    s
['chry kh] ('chryv q) hchzyq chnnyh bn-shlmyh vchnvn bn-tslf hshshy mdh shny    s   'chryv hchzyq mshlm bn-brkhyh ngd nshkhtv    s
['chry kh] ('chryv q) hchzyq mlkhyh bn-htsrfy 'd-byt hntynym vhrkhlym ngd sh'r hmfqd v'd 'lyt hfnh
vbyn 'lyt hfnh lsh'r hts'n hchzyqv htsrfym vhrkhlym  f
yhy kh'shr shm' snblt khy-'nchnv bvnym 't-hchvmh vychr lv vykh's hrbh vyl'g 'l-hyhvdym
vy'mr  lfny 'chyv vchyl shmrvn vy'mr mh hyhvdym h'mllym 'shym hy'zbv lhm hyzbchv hykhlv byvm hychyv 't-h'bnym m'rmvt h'fr vhmh shrvfvt
vtvbyh h'mny 'tslv vy'mr gm 'shr-hm bvnym 'm-y'lh shv'l vfrts chvmt 'bnyhm  f
shm' 'lhynv khy-hyynv bvzh vhshb chrftm 'l-r'shm vtnm lbzh b'rts shbyh
v'l-tkhs 'l-'vnm vcht'tm mlfnykh 'l-tmchh khy hkh'ysv lngd hbvnym
vnbnh 't-hchvmh vtqshr khl-hchvmh 'd-chtsyh vyhy lb l'm l'shvt  f
vyhy kh'shr shm' snblt vtvbyh vh'rbym vh'mnym vh'shdvdym khy-'lth 'rvkhh lchmvt yrvshlm khy-hchlv hfrtsym lhstm vychr lhm m'd
vyqshrv khlm ychdv lbv' lhlchm byrvshlm vl'shvt lv tv'h
vntfll 'l-'lhynv vn'myd mshmr 'lyhm yvmm vlylh mfnyhm
vy'mr yhvdh khshl khch hsbl vh'fr hrbh v'nchnv l' nvkhl lbnvt bchvmh
vy'mrv tsrynv l' yd'v vl' yr'v 'd 'shr-nbv' 'l-tvkhm vhrgnvm vhshbtnv 't-hml'khh
vyhy kh'shr-b'v hyhvdym hyshbym 'tslm vy'mrv lnv 'shr f'mym mkhl-hmqmvt 'shr-tshvbv 'lynv
v''myd mtchtyvt lmqvm m'chry lchvmh [btschchyym kh] (btschychym q) v''myd 't-h'm lmshfchvt 'm-chrbtyhm rmchyhm vqshttyhm
v'r' v'qvm v'mr 'l-hchrym v'l-hsgnym v'l-ytr h'm 'l-tyr'v mfnyhm 't-'dny hgdvl vhnvr' zkhrv vhlchmv 'l-'chykhm bnykhm vbntykhm nshykhm vbtykhm  f
vyhy kh'shr-shm'v 'vybynv khy-nvd'  lnv vyfr h'lhym 't-'tstm [vnshvb kh] (vnshb q) khlnv 'l-hchvmh 'ysh 'l-ml'khtv
vyhy  mn-hyvm hhv' chtsy n'ry 'shym bml'khh vchtsym mchzyqym vhrmchym hmgnym vhqshtvt vhshrynym vhshrym 'chry khl-byt yhvdh
hbvnym bchvmh vhnsh'ym bsbl 'mshym b'cht ydv 'shh bml'khh v'cht mchzqt hshlch
vhbvnym 'ysh chrbv 'svrym 'l-mtnyv vbvnym vhtvq' bshvfr 'tsly
v'mr 'l-hchrym v'l-hsgnym v'l-ytr h'm hml'khh hrbh vrchbh v'nchnv nfrdym 'l-hchvmh rchvqym 'ysh m'chyv
bmqvm 'shr tshm'v 't-qvl hshvfr shmh tqbtsv 'lynv 'lhynv ylchm lnv
v'nchnv 'shym bml'khh vchtsym mchzyqym brmchym m'lvt hshchr 'd ts't hkhvkhbym
gm b't hhy' 'mrty l'm 'ysh vn'rv ylynv btvkh yrvshlm vhyv-lnv hlylh mshmr vhyvm ml'khh
v'yn 'ny v'chy vn'ry v'nshy hmshmr 'shr 'chry 'yn-'nchnv fshtym bgdynv 'ysh shlchv hmym    s
vthy ts'qt h'm vnshyhm gdvlh 'l-'chyhm hyhvdym
vysh 'shr 'mrym bnynv vbntynv 'nchnv rbym vnqchh dgn vn'khlh vnchyh
vysh 'shr 'mrym shdtynv vkhrmynv vbtynv 'nchnv 'rbym vnqchh dgn br'b
vysh 'shr 'mrym lvynv khsf lmdt hmlkh shdtynv vkhrmynv
v'th khbshr 'chynv bshrnv khbnyhm bnynv vhnh 'nchnv khbshym 't-bnynv v't-bntynv l'bdym vysh mbntynv nkhbshvt v'yn l'l ydnv vshdtynv vkhrmynv l'chrym
vychr ly m'd kh'shr shm'ty 't-z'qtm v't hdbrym h'lh
vymlkh lby 'ly v'rybh 't-hchrym v't-hsgnym v'mrh lhm msh'  'ysh-b'chyv 'tm nsh'ym  v'tn 'lyhm qhlh gdvlh
v'mrh lhm 'nchnv qnynv 't-'chynv hyhvdym hnmkhrym lgvym khdy bnv vgm-'tm tmkhrv 't-'chykhm vnmkhrv-lnv vychryshv vl' mts'v dbr    s
[vy'mr kh] (v'vmr  q) l'-tvb hdbr 'shr-'tm 'shym hlv' byr't 'lhynv tlkhv mchrft hgvym 'vybynv
vgm-'ny 'chy vn'ry nshym bhm khsf vdgn n'zbh-n' 't-hmsh' hzh
hshybv n' lhm khhyvm shdtyhm khrmyhm zytyhm vbtyhm vm't hkhsf vhdgn htyrvsh vhytshr 'shr 'tm nshym bhm
vy'mrv nshyb vmhm l' nbqsh khn n'shh kh'shr 'th 'vmr v'qr' 't-hkhhnym v'shby'm l'shvt khdbr hzh
gm-chtsny n'rty v'mrh khkhh yn'r h'lhym 't-khl-h'ysh 'shr l'-yqym 't-hdbr hzh mbytv vmygy'v vkhkhh yhyh n'vr vrq vy'mrv khl-hqhl 'mn vyhllv 't-yhvh vy'sh h'm khdbr hzh
gm myvm  'shr-tsvh 'ty lhyvt fchm b'rts yhvdh mshnt 'shrym v'd shnt shlshym vshtym l'rtchshst' hmlkh shnym shtym 'shrh 'ny v'chy lchm hfchh l' 'khlty
vhfchvt hr'shnym 'shr-lfny hkhbydv 'l-h'm vyqchv mhm blchm vyyn 'chr khsf-shqlym 'rb'ym gm n'ryhm shltv 'l-h'm v'ny l'-'shyty khn mfny yr't 'lhym
vgm bml'kht hchvmh hz't hchzqty vshdh l' qnynv vkhl-n'ry qbvtsym shm 'l-hml'khh
vhyhvdym vhsgnym m'h vchmshym 'ysh vhb'ym 'lynv mn-hgvym 'shr-sbybtynv 'l-shlchny
v'shr hyh n'shh lyvm 'chd shvr 'chd ts'n shsh-brrvt vtsfrym n'shv-ly vbyn 'shrt ymym bkhl-yyn lhrbh v'm-zh lchm hfchh l' bqshty khy-khbdh h'bdh 'l-h'm hzh
zkhrh-ly 'lhy ltvbh khl 'shr-'shyty 'l-h'm hzh  f
vyhy kh'shr nshm' lsnblt vtvbyh vlgshm h'rby vlytr 'ybynv khy bnyty 't-hchvmh vl'-nvtr bh frts gm 'd-h't hhy' dltvt l'-h'mdty bsh'rym
vyshlch snblt vgshm 'ly l'mr lkhh vnv'dh ychdv bkhfyrym bbq't 'vnv vhmh chshbym l'shvt ly r'h
v'shlchh 'lyhm ml'khym l'mr ml'khh gdvlh 'ny 'shh vl' 'vkhl lrdt lmh tshbt hml'khh kh'shr 'rfh vyrdty 'lykhm
vyshlchv 'ly khdbr hzh 'rb' f'mym v'shyb 'vtm khdbr hzh    s
vyshlch 'ly snblt khdbr hzh f'm chmyshyt 't-n'rv v'grt ftvchh bydv
khtvb bh bgvym nshm' vgshmv 'mr 'th vhyhvdym chshbym lmrvd 'l-khn 'th bvnh hchvmh v'th hvh lhm lmlkh khdbrym h'lh
vgm-nby'ym h'mdt lqr' 'lykh byrvshlm l'mr mlkh byhvdh v'th yshm' lmlkh khdbrym h'lh v'th lkhh vnv'tsh ychdv    s
v'shlchh 'lyv l'mr l' nhyh khdbrym h'lh 'shr 'th 'vmr khy mlbkh 'th bvd'm
khy khlm myr'ym 'vtnv l'mr yrfv ydyhm mn-hml'khh vl' t'shh v'th chzq 't-ydy
v'ny-b'ty byt shm'yh bn-dlyh bn-mhytb'l vhv' 'tsvr vy'mr nv'd 'l-byt h'lhym 'l-tvkh hhykhl vnsgrh dltvt hhykhl khy b'ym lhrgkh vlylh b'ym lhrgkh
v'mrh h'ysh khmvny ybrch vmy khmvny 'shr-ybv' 'l-hhykhl vchy l' 'bv'
v'khyrh vhnh l'-'lhym shlchv khy hnbv'h dbr 'ly vtvbyh vsnblt shkhrv
lm'n shkhvr hv' lm'n-'yr' v''shh-khn vcht'ty vhyh lhm lshm r' lm'n ychrfvny  f
zkhrh 'lhy ltvbyh vlsnblt khm'shyv 'lh vgm lnv'dyh hnby'h vlytr hnby'ym 'shr hyv myr'ym 'vty
vtshlm hchvmh b'shrym vchmshh l'lvl lchmshym vshnym yvm  f
vyhy kh'shr shm'v khl-'vybynv vyr'v khl-hgvym 'shr sbybtynv vyflv m'd b'ynyhm vyd'v khy m't 'lhynv n'shth hml'khh hz't
gm  bymym hhm mrbym chry yhvdh 'grtyhm hvlkhvt 'l-tvbyh v'shr ltvbyh b'vt 'lyhm
khy-rbym byhvdh b'ly shbv'h lv khy-chtn hv' lshkhnyh bn-'rch vyhvchnn bnv lqch 't-bt-mshlm bn brkhyh
gm tvbtyv hyv 'mrym lfny vdbry hyv mvtsy'ym lv 'grvt shlch tvbyh lyr'ny
vyhy kh'shr nbnth hchvmh v''myd hdltvt vyfqdv  hshv'rym vhmshrrym vhlvym
v'tsvh 't-chnny 'chy v't-chnnyh shr hbyrh 'l-yrvshlm khy-hv' kh'ysh 'mt vyr' 't-h'lhym mrbym
[vy'mr kh] (v'mr q) lhm l' yftchv sh'ry yrvshlm 'd-chm hshmsh v'd hm 'mdym ygyfv hdltvt v'chzv vh'myd mshmrvt yshby yrvshlm 'ysh bmshmrv v'ysh ngd bytv
vh'yr rchbt ydym vgdvlh vh'm m't btvkhh v'yn btym bnvym
vytn 'lhy 'l-lby v'qbtsh 't-hchrym v't-hsgnym v't-h'm lhtychsh v'mts' sfr hychsh h'vlym br'shvnh v'mts' khtvb bv  f
'lh  bny hmdynh h'lym mshby hgvlh 'shr hglh nbvkhdntsr mlkh bbl vyshvbv lyrvshlm vlyhvdh 'ysh l'yrv
hb'ym 'm-zrbbl yshv' nchmyh 'zryh r'myh nchmny mrdkhy blshn msfrt bgvy nchvm b'nh msfr 'nshy 'm yshr'l    s
bny fr'sh 'lfym m'h vshb'ym vshnym    s
bny shftyh shlsh m'vt shb'ym vshnym    s
bny 'rch shsh m'vt chmshym vshnym    s
bny-fcht mv'b lbny yshv' vyv'b 'lfym vshmnh m'vt shmnh 'shr    s
bny 'ylm 'lf m'tym chmshym v'rb'h    s
bny ztv' shmnh m'vt 'rb'ym vchmshh    s
bny zkhy shb' m'vt vshshym    s
bny bnvy shsh m'vt 'rb'ym vshmnh    s
bny bby shsh m'vt 'shrym vshmnh    s
bny 'zgd 'lfym shlsh m'vt 'shrym vshnym    s
bny 'dnyqm shsh m'vt shshym vshb'h    s
bny bgvy 'lfym shshym vshb'h    s
bny 'dyn shsh m'vt chmshym vchmshh    s
bny-'tr lchzqyh tsh'ym vshmnh    s
bny chshm shlsh m'vt 'shrym vshmnh    s
bny btsy shlsh m'vt 'shrym v'rb'h    s
bny chryf m'h shnym 'shr    s
bny gb'vn  tsh'ym vchmshh    s
'nshy byt-lchm vntfh m'h shmnym vshmnh    s
'nshy 'ntvt m'h 'shrym vshmnh    s
'nshy byt-'zmvt 'rb'ym vshnym    s
'nshy qryt y'rym khfyrh vb'rvt shb' m'vt 'rb'ym vshlshh    s
'nshy hrmh vgb' shsh m'vt 'shrym v'chd    s
'nshy mkhms m'h v'shrym vshnym    s
'nshy byt-'l vh'y m'h 'shrym vshlshh    s
'nshy nbv 'chr chmshym vshnym    s
bny 'ylm 'chr 'lf m'tym chmshym v'rb'h    s
bny chrm shlsh m'vt v'shrym    s
bny yrchv shlsh m'vt 'rb'ym vchmshh    s
bny-ld chdyd v'vnv shb' m'vt v'shrym v'chd    s
bny sn'h shlsht 'lfym tsh' m'vt vshlshym  f
hkhhnym bny yd'yh lbyt yshv' tsh' m'vt shb'ym vshlshh    s
bny 'mr 'lf chmshym vshnym    s
